ConnectionStrings._OperationsDb_example: Host=server;Database=operations;Username=ops_api;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=2;Maximum Pool Size=20;Connection Idle Lifetime=300

Authentication._comment: Both roles are mandatory outside Development - Program.cs refuses to start if either is blank. AdminRole gates writes (OpsAdmin); AuditorRole gates reads over auditing rosters and licensing data (OpsAuditor). Set the real values via OPS_ADMIN_ROLE / OPS_AUDITOR_ROLE in the ADO variable group; the deploy pipeline writes them into appsettings.Production.json.

DiskMonitoring._comment: Display thresholds for the disk page; the sync pipeline computes alert_status using DISK_WARN_PCT/DISK_CRIT_PCT_DEFAULT env vars set in ADO. Keep these aligned.

Auditing._comment: Attestation is SSO-gated (Windows auth + identity == recipient); there is no signing key. BaseUrl builds the attest.html?p=<packetId> links; set the real Auditing__BaseUrl via env var in prod. CcAuditMailbox is CC'd on every attestation email.

Scheduler._comment: Auditing automation (AuditingSchedulerService). OFF by default -- it sends real attestation invites/reminders via SMTP. Set Enabled=true to auto-launch campaigns for due auto_launch apps and remind outstanding packets within ReminderWindowDays of the due date.

Smtp._comment: Internal relay for attestation emails. Anonymous (allowlisted by source IP + sender), so no credentials. Placeholders here; set the real Smtp__Host, Smtp__From and Auditing__BaseUrl via env vars in prod (same as the DB connection string). Port 25 plaintext is the relay default; set UseStartTls true only if the relay requires it.
